name: Getting Started with AI Agents
description: A hands-on workshop introducing developers to building AI agents that reason, use tools, and complete multi-step tasks. Participants will build a simple agent from scratch using Claude and learn core patterns like tool use, memory, and orchestration.
targetAudience: Developers with basic Python experience who are new to AI agents and want to build their first one
prerequisites: Free Anthropic API key (instructions sent before event)
